title: AI Square - AI Productivity & Content Platform

description.en: Led production LLM features and retrieval systems, improving workflow speed by 30-40% and reducing unsupported generations by 20-30%.
description.ja: 本番向けLLM機能と検索基盤を主導し、業務速度を30-40%改善、未対応生成を20-30%削減。

en: Lead AI product engineering for productivity and content workflows, delivering LLM-powered features and retrieval systems for production use.
Shipped AI-assisted drafting, editing, and rewriting capabilities that improved end-user content workflow speed by 30-40%.
Designed retrieval systems for templates, support content, and internal knowledge access, improving response relevance while reducing unsupported generations by 20-30%.
Built backend orchestration and API services with Python and FastAPI, reducing integration effort by 40% and improving maintainability.
Introduced prompt evaluation/testing workflows and internal automation that reduced regressions and saved cross-functional teams 10-20 hours per month.
ja: 生産性・コンテンツ領域のAIプロダクト開発を主導し、LLM機能と検索基盤を本番環境で提供。
下書き・編集・書き換え機能を実装し、エンドユーザーのコンテンツ作業速度を30-40%向上。
テンプレート、サポート情報、社内ナレッジ向けの検索基盤を設計し、関連性向上と未対応生成20-30%削減を実現。
Python/FastAPIでバックエンド連携基盤を構築し、機能統合工数を40%削減しつつ保守性を向上。
プロンプト評価フローと業務自動化を導入し、回帰を抑制しつつ月10-20時間の作業を削減。

description.en: Built applied AI systems for NLP use cases and improved deployment readiness, cutting integration friction by 30%.
description.ja: NLP領域の実用AIシステムを構築し、運用準備を改善して統合摩擦を30%削減。

en: Built applied AI and machine learning systems for NLP-focused themes and internal engineering use cases.
Implemented APIs and service components that reduced model integration friction by 30% for engineering teams.
Evaluated transformer-based and LLM approaches to shorten technical validation cycles by 25%.
Improved training, packaging, and deployment workflows, reducing handoff time from research to engineering by 30-40%.
Supported Docker/Kubernetes-based deployment environments to improve delivery reliability.
ja: NLP関連テーマと社内向け課題に対し、実用的なAI・機械学習システムを構築。
APIとサービスコンポーネントを実装し、モデル統合の負荷を30%削減。
Transformer/LLMの検証を進め、技術評価サイクルを25%短縮。
学習・パッケージング・デプロイ工程を改善し、研究から実装への引き継ぎ時間を30-40%短縮。
Docker/Kubernetes環境の運用を支援し、デプロイの安定性を向上。

description.en: Built full-stack document workflow systems that reduced manual processing by 25-35% and improved execution efficiency by 15-20%.
description.ja: 文書業務向けフルスタックシステムを開発し、手作業を25-35%削減、業務効率を15-20%向上。

en: Developed enterprise workflow systems for document intake, classification, extraction, and review using full-stack engineering.
Built business applications and APIs that reduced manual processing effort by 25-35%.
Implemented frontend and backend features that improved task completion efficiency by 15-20%.
Integrated machine learning capabilities into workflow systems to improve classification/extraction accuracy and reduce repetitive review.
Handled production issue investigation, fixes, and iterative enhancements for business-critical workflows.
ja: 文書受付・分類・抽出・レビューを支える業務システムをフルスタックで開発。
業務アプリとAPIを構築し、手作業工数を25-35%削減。
フロントエンドとバックエンド機能を実装し、業務タスク完了効率を15-20%向上。
機械学習機能を統合し、分類・抽出精度を高めつつ反復レビューを削減。
本番障害の調査・修正・改善を継続し、業務システムの信頼性を向上。

description.en: Supported ML experimentation with reproducible analysis and improved experiment turnaround by 15-20%.
description.ja: 再現可能な分析基盤を整備し、機械学習実験の検証速度を15-20%改善。

en: Built Python scripts for data preparation, analysis, and model evaluation to improve experimentation throughput.
Supported feature engineering, model training, and baseline comparison across prototype themes.
Documented experiment outcomes and communicated findings to researchers/engineers for better reproducibility.
ja: データ準備・分析・評価のPythonスクリプトを整備し、実験の進行速度を向上。
特徴量設計、学習、ベースライン比較などプロトタイプ検証を支援。
結果の文書化と共有を通じて、再現性と技術判断の質を向上。

description.en: Built user-facing frontend features and reusable components for recruiting product workflows.
description.ja: 採用向けプロダクトで、ユーザー向け機能と再利用可能なUIコンポーネントを開発。

en: Developed frontend functionality for recruiting and user-facing product screens.
Built reusable UI components that reduced duplicate implementation effort.
Collaborated with designers and engineers to improve usability and resolve frontend issues.
Supported release preparation, testing, and maintenance for ongoing product operations.
ja: 採用関連・ユーザー向け画面のフロントエンド機能を設計・実装。
再利用可能なUIコンポーネントを構築し、重複実装を削減。
デザイナー/エンジニアと連携し、使いやすさ向上と不具合修正を推進。
リリース準備・テスト・保守を担い、継続運用を支援。
